pi_items.source: Verified against setup_task.ps1 and verifier.py which initialize and check the FlipBitmap property in the bcWebCam.ini file.
Verified against setup_task.ps1 and verifier.py. The setup script sets Type=0 for [BarcodeL], and the verifier expects it to be non-zero (meaning enabled).
Verified against setup_task.ps1 and verifier.py which initialize and check the SendKeysPostfix property in the bcWebCam.ini file.
Verified against setup_task.ps1 and verifier.py which initialize and check the BcGracePeriod property in the bcWebCam.ini file.
Verified against setup_task.ps1 which dynamically writes the INI file to this exact path.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a synthetically configured instance of bcWebCam. The target application configuration was verified by analyzing setup_task.ps1 and verifier.py. The expected values are: FlipBitmap is True, linear barcodes are enabled (BarcodeL type > 0), SendKeysPostfix is {TAB}, and BcGracePeriod is 2. The target configuration file is confirmed to be C:\Users\Docker\AppData\Local\bcWebCam\bcWebCam.ini.
